name: Gr#nkohlsuppe (Kale & Potato Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound garlic sausage, smoked and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the potatoes.
2. Combine with vegetable oil and water.
3. Cook for 20 to 30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Remove potatoes and reserve liquid.
5. Mash potatoes through a sieve and return to the potato liquid.
6. Add salt and pepper and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Wash kale, discarding all tough leaves, and cut into shreds.
8. Add to potatoes and cook for 25 minutes.
9. Add sausage and simmer gently for 5 minutes.
